data.name: King of Spies
data.detailed_description:
關注焦點


關於此遊戲


“King of Spies” is a political spy-thriller visual novel and yuri dating sim. You play as Kelly Bond, a former USAF Intelligence Officer turned political espionage specialist. Infiltrate a rising political star’s campaign and discover their deepest secrets as your mission will decide the country’s fate forever!



  • A gripping political espionage and romance storyline.
  • Soothing contemporary jazz soundtrack
  • Beautiful anime art
  • Multiple endings

data.short_description: “King of Spies” is a political spy-thriller visual novel and yuri dating sim. You play as Kelly Bond, a former USAF Intelligence Officer turned political espionage specialist.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista or higher
  • 處理器: 1.5Ghz Processor or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X version Leopard 10.5.8 or later
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
